title: About
text:
I am an academic researcher focused on computational linguistics, educational data science, and open scholarly communication.



Reproducible publishing and documentation
Data-driven research tools
Academic website design for research visibility

This site is designed to present my work clearly and professionally for colleagues, students, and collaborators.
